raw:
{"mode": "market_intel", "engine": "cerebras-120b", "insight": "**Actionable Insight:** 

Create a solution to address the problem of **Crypto Wallet Address Clustering and Organization**. Many users across various crypto communities (e.g., GitHub, Farcaster, Bluesky) are complaining about the difficulty in managing and organizing multiple crypto wallet addresses.

**Concrete Approach:**

Develop a simple CLI tool, `crypto_wallet_manager.py`, that uses natural language processing (NLP) and clustering algorithms to automatically categorize and group related crypto wallet addresses based on user input (e.g., labels, categories). This tool will utilize the Gemini API to fetch wallet addresses and then apply clustering techniques (e.g., DBSCAN, K-Means) to identify patterns and group similar addresses together. Users can then easily view, manage, and export their organized wallet addresses.", "run": 1255}
